Alumni Stories

What Our Alumni Say

Hear from our successful alumni now making their mark in the industry

"

JCE provided me with excellent technical education and placement support. The faculty was always supportive and helped me secure my dream job at TCS.

Priya Sharma
Software Engineer at TCS
Batch 2022
"

The practical training and industry exposure at JCE prepared me well for the corporate world. I am grateful for the opportunities I received here.

Rahul Kumar
Associate Consultant at Infosys
Batch 2023
"

The college infrastructure and labs are top-notch. The placement cell worked tirelessly to ensure we all got placed in good companies.

Anitha Raj
Data Analyst at Wipro
Batch 2022
